hero.title: Bekasen — Premium Digital Agency
hero.headline: I build custom websites and management apps for Haitian businesses and the diaspora.
hero.subtitle: High-performance websites, business applications and AI integration. Advanced technical expertise for ambitious companies, wherever they are.

techMarquee.title: Powered by a precision engineering stack

about.title: About Bekasen
about.description: A premium digital agency dedicated to the Haitian community.

hero.title: Building the Future of the Haitian Digital Ecosystem
hero.subtitle: Bekasen is more than an agency; we are your technical partners in growth and innovation.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Bekasen is a one-person digital agency serving Haitian businesses and the diaspora. We don't pretend to be a multinational team — we're a focused operation that ships custom websites, business management apps, and AI integrations. Our promise: 100% remote work, response time under 24 hours, and payment via Wise, Zelle, or Crypto.
story.passion: Made with passion for the Haitian community 🇭🇹

founder.name: Wadson Joseph
founder.role: Solo Founder · Data Analyst · Full-stack Developer
founder.bio: I'm a Haitian solo founder building for businesses at home and in the diaspora. The combination of data analyst, full-stack developer, and database student means I see your project end-to-end — from the data model to the user interface. I speak Creole, French, and English. I understand the cultural and payment reality. I work 100% remote with a response time under 24 hours.
founder.vision: My goal is simple: build technology that actually works for Haitian businesses — fast, reliable, and built by someone who understands the context.

values.title: Our Values
values.integrity: Integrity first in every line of code.

diasporaPromise.title: The Diaspora Promise
diasporaPromise.pay: Pay via Wise, Zelle, or Crypto

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Tailored digital solutions to propel your business forward.

portfolioSection.whoBehindDescription:
These are demo projects we built to showcase what's possible — not client work. Each one is a real, deployable product covering a specific use case (medical clinic, hotel, marketplace, NGO). Use them as proof of what can be built for you, not as case studies of what we've delivered to others.

If you want one of these adapted for your business, that's exactly what we do.
portfolioSection.title: Technical excellence that drives your vision.
portfolioSection.project1Description: Complete medical ERP with patient management, appointments and billing.
portfolioSection.project2Description: Hotel management system with online booking and admin dashboard.
portfolioSection.project3Description: Mobile-first marketplace connecting local sellers and buyers.
portfolioSection.project4Description: Institutional website with immersive animations and visual storytelling.

servicesBento.title: What We Do For
servicesBento.subtitle: Tailored digital solutions to propel your business toward success.
servicesBento.service1Description: A fast and elegant static website to showcase your brand online with a custom design.
servicesBento.service2Description: A website with a simple manager allowing you to manage your content dynamically and easily.
servicesBento.service3Description: For more complex applications, custom workflows and advanced integrations, please contact us.

contact.listeningSubtitle: Questions, ideas, or just saying bonjour.
contact.formSubtitle: Tell us about your brand, campaign, or research needs. We work with businesses in Haiti, the Caribbean, and the diaspora. No commitment required.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

processTimeline.title: How it works
processTimeline.subtitle: A proven 4-step process to turn your vision into digital reality.
processTimeline.step1Description: We analyze your needs, market and goals to define a tailored digital strategy.
processTimeline.step2Description: Creating interactive mockups and a premium design that reflects your brand identity.
processTimeline.step3Description: Clean, performant and tested code. Every feature is validated before going to production.
processTimeline.step4Description: Deployment, SEO optimization and performance tracking for continuous growth.

pricingFAQ.title: Payment & Questions
pricingFAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
pricingFAQ.paymentDescription: We accept several methods for your convenience.
pricingFAQ.contactMessage: Didn't find the answer? We're real people, just like you — ask us anything.
pricingFAQ.faq1Question: How long does it take to create a website?
pricingFAQ.faq1Answer: A premium showcase site is delivered in 1 to 2 weeks. A management application takes 3 to 4 weeks. Custom projects vary depending on complexity.
pricingFAQ.faq2Question: Do you offer support after delivery?
pricingFAQ.faq2Answer: Yes, all our packages include 30 days of free support after delivery. Monthly maintenance plans are also available.
pricingFAQ.faq3Question: Can I edit the content myself?
pricingFAQ.faq3Answer: Absolutely. We integrate an intuitive content management system so you can update your site easily.
pricingFAQ.faq4Question: Do you work with international clients?
pricingFAQ.faq4Answer: Yes, we serve clients worldwide, with a specialization for the Haitian community and diaspora.
pricingFAQ.faq5Question: How does the payment process work?
pricingFAQ.faq5Answer: We require a 50% deposit to start the project, and the remaining 50% upon final delivery.

finalCTA.title: Let's turn your vision into reality
finalCTA.subtitle: Join the businesses that trust Bekasen for their digital transformation.

consent.title: Privacy preferences
consent.description: We only use the storage you approve: site preferences, language, theme, and AI chat history. Chat history is saved locally and, if you agree, in our Postgres database through an anonymous session.
consent.preferencesDescription: Save your theme, selected language, and interface preferences.
consent.aiChatDescription: Save your chat history locally and in Postgres so you can resume the conversation later.

chatbot.title: Bekasen Assistant
chatbot.emptyState: Ask about services, pricing, timeline, projects, or anything else.
chatbot.autoReply: Thanks for your message! Our AI assistant is coming soon. In the meantime, feel free to use the quick questions below or contact us directly.
chatbot.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the Bekasen assistant. How can I help you?
chatbot.memoryNoticeDescription: To save chat history and continue later, accept chat memory. Without consent, this conversation stays only in the current session.

services.label: Services
services.question: What services does Bekasen offer?
services.answer: We design and build high-performance websites, custom business applications, and AI-powered solutions — tailored for ambitious companies.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.question: How much do your services cost?
pricing.answer: Our projects start from a discovery call. Pricing depends on scope, complexity and timeline. Visit our pricing page or start a project to get a custom quote.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.question: How long does a project take?
timeline.answer: A typical website takes 4–8 weeks from kickoff to launch. Complex apps can take 8–16 weeks. We keep you in the loop at every stage.

techStack.label: Tech stack
techStack.question: What technologies do you use?
techStack.answer: We work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, PostgreSQL and modern AI frameworks. Always the right tool for the job.

contact.label: Contact
contact.question: How can I reach the team?
contact.answer: You can start a project through our form, or email us directly at hello@bekasen.com. We typically respond within 24 hours.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.question: Can you show me some recent projects?
portfolio.answer: Yes. You can browse our portfolio to explore web platforms, business apps, and digital experiences built by Bekasen. Each project is designed around performance, design quality, and business impact.

process.label: Process
process.question: How does a project with Bekasen work?
process.answer: We usually work in 4 stages: discovery and strategy, design and prototyping, development and testing, then launch and optimization. You stay informed throughout every phase.

location.label: Location
location.question: Where is the Bekasen team based?
location.answer: Bekasen works with clients in Haiti, across the Caribbean, and throughout the diaspora. Our workflow is flexible and built for efficient remote as well as local collaboration.

contactPage.title: Ready to Transform
contactPage.subtitle: Book a free diagnostic call with our technical team or leave us a message. We respond within 24 hours.

dashboard.overview: Here is what's happening with your projects.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Overview of your current and past collaborations with Bekasen.

codeReviews.title: Code Reviews
codeReviews.subtitle: Track technical feedback and approvals for your project milestones.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Bekasen, we take the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your information when you use our services and visit our website.

collection.title: Data We Collect
collection.contact: Contact information (name, email, phone) when you contact us or register for our services
collection.service: Information related to services you request or receive
collection.usage: Usage data (pages visited, time spent, interactions) via cookies and tracking tools
collection.technical: Technical information (IP address, device type, browser, operating system)
collection.communication: Correspondence and communications you send us

usage.title: How We Use Your Data
usage.communication: Communicate relevant updates and service information to you
usage.marketing: Send you marketing communications (with your consent)
usage.compliance: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We never sell your personal data. We only share your information if legally required or with trusted third-party service providers who help us deliver our services, all subject to strict confidentiality obligations.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal data as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfill legal obligations. You may request deletion of your data at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: Under applicable law (including GDPR), you have the following rights:
rights.correction: Correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
rights.objection: Objection to processing of your data

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Our website uses cookies to improve your experience. You can control cookie settings in your browser. Some cookies are essential to the website's functioning, while others help us analyze and improve our performance.

aiChat.title: AI chat and history
aiChat.content: If you accept AI chat memory, we create an anonymous session and save your messages locally and in a Postgres database so your history can be restored. If you decline or withdraw consent, local history is removed and the server session is deleted when it exists.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us at:

privacy.disclaimer: This privacy policy is provided for informational purposes. Consult with a qualified attorney for legal advice specific to your situation.

terms.title: Terms of Use

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using our website and services, you accept these terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our platform.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: Bekasen provides web design and development services, business application creation, AI integration, and other digital services. The specific scope of services will be defined in your contract or quote.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.bekasenContent: All content created by Bekasen (code, designs, frameworks) remains our intellectual property
ip.clientContent: You retain ownership of your client content and data you provide
ip.license: You receive a license to use the delivered work for agreed purposes

responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.compliance: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
responsibilities.rights: Ensure you have necessary rights to content you provide
responsibilities.prohibited: Not use our services for illegal or harmful activities

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.content: Pricing, payment terms, and schedules will be specified in your quote or contract. Late payments may result in service interruption. Applicable taxes are added to stated rates.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the extent permitted by law, Bekasen shall not be liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages. Our total liability to you shall not exceed the amount you paid us for the services.

indemnity.title: Indemnification
indemnity.content: You will indemnify us against all claims, damages, and costs arising from your use of the services or violation of these terms.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: Either you or Bekasen may terminate our services according to terms specified in your contract. Following termination, applicable provisions shall remain in force.

law.title: Governing Law
law.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Florida, United States (or your applicable jurisdiction). Parties consent to exclusive jurisdiction of competent courts.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions regarding these terms of use, please contact us at:

terms.disclaimer: These terms of use are provided for informational purposes. Consult with a qualified attorney for legal advice specific to your situation.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer

general.title: General Disclaimer
general.content: This website and all services provided by Bekasen are provided 'as is'. Bekasen makes no express or implied representations or warranties regarding the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of information provided.

asis.title: As-Is Basis
asis.content: Your use of the website and services is at your own risk. Bekasen is not liable for any damage, loss, or inconvenience resulting from your use.

warranties.title: No Warranties
warranties.availability: Any warranty that the website will be available without interruption or error
warranties.uninterrupted: Any warranty that the website will operate uninterrupted or secure
warranties.accuracy: Any warranty regarding content accuracy or completeness
warranties.third_party: Any liability for third-party services or content

thirdparty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdparty.content: Our website may contain links or integrations with third-party services. We are not responsible for their quality, reliability, availability, or content. Review their policies separately.

damages.title: Limitation of Damages
damages.content: In no case shall Bekasen be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including loss of revenue or profits, arising from your use or inability to use the website or services.

links.title: External Links
links.content: Our website may contain links to external websites. We do not control these sites and are not responsible for their content. Access to these sites is at your own risk.

advice.title: No Professional Advice
advice.content: Information provided does not constitute professional advice (legal, financial, etc.). Consult with a qualified professional for your specific needs.

changes.title: Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue our services at any time without notice. We may also modify this disclaimer at any time.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this disclaimer, please contact us at:

disclaimer.notice: This disclaimer is provided for informational purposes. Consult with a qualified attorney for legal advice specific to your situation.

forWho.title: Built for the businesses that need this most
forWho.subtitle: Not a generic agency. Sectors I understand and have built demos for:

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page does not exist or has moved. Head back to the homepage or talk to us directly.
